---
title: "Blogs"
toc: false
---

::: {.page-hero}
## Research Notes

I plan to use this page for short research notes on modelling ideas, reading reflections, analysis workflows, and technical decisions that emerge during ongoing projects.
:::

## Planned Topics

::: {.grid-two}
::: {.panel-card}
### Modelling Notes

- What should count as human-model alignment?
- Trial-level evaluation beyond aggregate accuracy
- Interpreting hidden states in recurrent models
- Practical issues in multilingual RSA
:::

::: {.panel-card}
### Workflow Notes

- Reproducible behavioural analysis
- Comparing cognitive and neural baselines
- Visualization choices for representational analyses
- Small tools for research pipelines
:::
:::

## Coming Soon

::: {.panel-card}
Posts will be added here as project notes, reading summaries, and methods write-ups. The aim is to keep these posts concise, technical, and useful for documenting an evolving computational modelling profile.
:::
